description: Professional creative studio for Stable Diffusion, SDXL, SD3, and FLUX
fullDescription:
Invoke is a professional, end-to-end creative studio for generative image work. It pairs a unified canvas + gallery + boards UI with a workflow node editor and an integrated model manager — closer to a Photoshop-style product than a node-only tool.

Supported models:
- Stable Diffusion 1.5 / 2.x
- SDXL 1.0
- SD3 / SD3.5
- FLUX.1 dev / schnell
- FLUX.2 Klein (4B + 9B)
- Z-Image Turbo
- ControlNet, LoRA, IP-Adapter, T2I-Adapter

Features:
- Unified canvas with inpainting, outpainting, brush layers
- Workflow editor with reusable templates
- Boards / gallery for project organization
- Built-in model manager (URL / HF repo / local file)
- REST + Socket.IO API (OpenAPI docs at /docs)
- GPU-accelerated; runs on NVIDIA via runtimeClassName: nvidia
- No built-in user login — gated behind the Olares entrance

Notes:
- amd64 only. NVIDIA GPU required.
- No models ship in the image; install via Model Manager on first run.
- FLUX.1 generation needs 10+ GB VRAM; FLUX.2 Klein 9B needs ~24 GB.
name: invokeai
title: Invoke
